opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel like I'm burning alive, my whole body is bright red like a sunburn, and I can't even sit up without blacking out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden, severe high fever, a widespread sunburn-like rash, and extreme dizziness progressing to near-collapse.

symptom_narrative.character: high fever with severe muscle aches, diffuse red sunburn-like rash across trunk and limbs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — can't sit up without blacking out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe watery diarrhoea, multiple episodes of vomiting, extreme lightheadedness, increasing confusion over the last 4 hours, eyes and mouth look extremely red
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying flat in bed, severely lethargic and confused

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: currently menstruating and using high-absorbency tampons; roommate present and providing some history due to patient's confusion

reluctance_topics: menstrual/tampon use details until directly asked
